languages.text: "Угрозы и неповиновение. Почему бы мне не убить тебя на месте, полковник?"
"Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"
languages.original_text: "Угрозы и неповиновение. Почему бы мне не убить тебя на месте, полковник?"

traits.locale_text: "Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"
"Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"
"Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"
"Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"
"Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"

languages.text: "Drohungen und Insubordination. Warum sollte ich Euch nicht auf der Stelle töten, Colonel?"
languages.original_text: "Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"

traits.locale_text: "Drohungen und Insubordination. Warum sollte ich Euch nicht auf der Stelle töten, Colonel?"

languages.text: « Menaces et insubordination ? Donnez-moi une bonne raison de ne pas vous abattre sur-le-champ, colonel. »
languages.original_text: "Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"

traits.locale_text: « Menaces et insubordination ? Donnez-moi une bonne raison de ne pas vous abattre sur-le-champ, colonel. »

languages.text: «Amenazas e insubordinación. Dígame, coronel, ¿por qué no debería matarlo aquí y ahora?».
languages.original_text: "Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"

traits.locale_text: «Amenazas e insubordinación. Dígame, coronel, ¿por qué no debería matarlo aquí y ahora?».

languages.text: "Tehditler ve itaatsizlik. Söylesene Albay, seni neden şuracıkta öldürmeyeyim?"
languages.original_text: "Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"

traits.locale_text: "Tehditler ve itaatsizlik. Söylesene Albay, seni neden şuracıkta öldürmeyeyim?"

languages.text: “威胁长官，公然抗命。告诉我，上校，我为什么不该现在就宰了你？”
languages.original_text: "Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"

traits.locale_text: “威胁长官，公然抗命。告诉我，上校，我为什么不该现在就宰了你？”

languages.text: 「脅迫と反逆。なぜ、私はあなたを即座に殺さないのですか、大佐？」
languages.original_text: "Threats and insubordination. Tell me, Colonel, why shouldn't I kill you on the spot?"

traits.locale_text: 「脅迫と反逆。なぜ、私はあなたを即座に殺さないのですか、大佐？」
